title: evolvulus alsinoides var. acapulcensis
intro: Evolvulus alsinoides var. acapulcensis is a variety of the Evolvulus alsinoides plant, commonly known as dwarf morning glory, which is a type of flowering plant in the Convolvulaceae family. It is native to Mexico and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and soothing respiratory problems, making it a popular herbal remedy in some parts of the world. Evolvulus alsinoides var. acapulcensis can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its leaves and flowers can be used in herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
